name: Flynn Gailmann
description: Flynn is a fiery person. He is the youngest of the Gailmann siblings and the youngest son of the head of the family, Coriolanus Gailmann. He lives a lot of the time in the shadow of his brothers so he's always trying to prove himself. He is a bit cocky and spoiled as his mother raised him to want for nothing. He makes a lot of mistakes and can be very impulsive.
creator: DemonSonata
